title: Glow Lights
description: A lightweight mod that aims to make glow ink more useful with palatable blocks.
body:
To add more uses to glow ink (and, by extension, glow squids), this mod currently adds five new light source blocks:

- One full block called a glow lantern
- A new torch type called a glow torch
- Three new campfire types derived from each vanilla prismarine type.

Each light source emits a light level of 10 by default, and emit a light level of 15 when waterlogged. Hopefully, this property will allow you to explore underwater expanses more comfortably, as well as give you more options when building and decorating!
